title: Section 93
content: The President 1***, the Governors of 2[Madras], 3[Bombay and 4[West Bengal]], 5*** 6*** and the Chief Justice and Judges of the High Courts 7***, shall not be liable to arrest by order of the Small Cause Court.
footnote: 1. The words "and Members of his Council" rep. by the A.O. 1948. 2. Subs. by the A.O. 1948, for "Fort St. George". 3. Subs. by Act 7 of 1912, s. 7 and the Schedule E, for "and Bombay". 4. Subs. by A.O. 1948, for "Fort William in Bengal". 5. The words "and the Members of their respective Councils" rep, by the A O.1937. 6. The words "the Lieutenant-Governor of Bengal" omitted by Act 7 of 1912, s. 7 and the Schedule E. 7. The words and letter "for Part A States" omitted by the A.O. (No. 2) 1956.
